name: clinical-task-row
title: Clinical Task Row
description: One item on a task / order worklist — a completion checkbox, title + detail, a priority badge, an overdue-aware due line, and an assignee avatar with a Tooltip.

props.name: overdue
props.description: Render the due line as overdue (destructive).

props.name: assignee
props.description: Shown as an avatar with a name Tooltip.

clinicalNotes: Priority uses the shared tone system (routine=secondary, urgent=warning, STAT=destructive) and STAT pulses (motion-safe) to draw the eye on a busy board; routine priority is not badged to reduce noise. The due line turns destructive only while overdue AND incomplete. Completing a task strikes + dims it in place rather than removing it, so a worklist stays stable and auditable during a shift. The checkbox carries an explicit aria-label that reflects the toggle direction.
notes: Layer-M1 atom. Client component (checkbox state). Feeds TaskWorklistPanel (M2) and the Provider block.
